name: Chengtun Mining Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengtun Mining Group Co., Ltd. engages in non-ferrous metal mining activities in China. The company explores for copper, tin, tungsten, lead, zinc, gold, silver, and polymetallic metals. It also provides metal commercial factoring, as well as metal financing services. The company was formerly known as Xiamen Eagle Mining Group Co., Ltd. Chengtun Mining Group Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Xiamen, China.
